{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Northstrider's pocket world
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider's pocket world]] is a miniature version of [[Ghostwater]] consisting of sand, seaweed, a forest of blades, a cave with two wells, and a fenced-off living area.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] and [[Ruby]] trained inside [[Northstrider's pocket world]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
